core.app.name: PymeSec
core.shell.title: Core Shell Preview
core.shell.subtitle: A first visual pass of the left-hand shell, driven by the plugin menu registry and core-controlled themes.
core.shell.preview: The shell stays in control of layout while plugins contribute routes and navigation entries.
core.shell.no_selection: No visible menu with a route is currently selected.
core.shell.theme_copy: Themes live at the shell layer and should remain token-driven and core-governed, not plugin-defined CSS free-for-all.
core.shell.theme_rule_core: The core owns the shell frame and the visual tokens.
core.shell.theme_rule_plugins: Plugins contribute menus and screens, not arbitrary shell styling.
core.shell.theme_rule_tokens: Theme switching is safe because the runtime only swaps approved design tokens.
